title: Repealed by Acts 2009, No. 403, §2, effective July 7, 2009.
doc_html:
PART IV.  DEALERS AND MANUFACTURERS

OF RECREATIONAL PRODUCTS

SUBPART A.  GENERAL PROVISIONS APPLICABLE

TO ALL RECREATIONAL PRODUCTS DEALERS

AND MANUFACTURERS

§811.  Repealed by Acts 2009, No. 403, §2, eff. July 7, 2009.
